2021/5/2 29.67 AsR Single Ziyu Wu (吴子钰)

Guangdong Open 2021 (2021广东公开赛)

Dayan Megaminx V2 (大雁五魔V2)

Reconstruction by James Macdiarmid

U' DLv' U2' F2' DLv' U2 F2' BR DLv U2' R' F U2 F' // more star edges + yellow-blue pair

R U' R' U R' DLv F R2 U F' // red-blue pair

y U' Rv U R' F2 U2 DLv' DLv BR' BR' R2' L' U L // purple-yellow block

R' U U R2 BR' DLv' U R2' F R F // yellow-blue block

R2 R U R' U2' R2 y' U' R U' R' U R U2' R' // orange-light green pair + preserve pink-red

Rv' y' R' U R2 U2' // blue-red block

Rv U' U' BR R' F BR' R2 U' R' Fv' R' F2 R // green-purple block while forming light blue-orange pair

Fv U2 y' BR' R // light blue-orange pair

R' R BR' BR R' R BR' R' U R // green edge + lockups

Rv' y' R DR' R U2 R' U' R U R' DR // keyhole beige-light blue corner

L' U' R' U R U' U' R' U R U' R U R' L R' // red-green block

U F' U2 F U' L' U L // light green-pink pair

U R U' R' U R U' R' // pink-beige pair

y' y' R' U' R U' R' U2 R // EP

y y F R F' L F R' F' L' // solve corners

将标准配色中的黄色 (Y) 和奶油色 (E) 互换下即可得到Juan Pablo Huanqui配色. 本文已更换.

[(Top)(Front)] [(顶)(前)]

W - White 白

R - Red 红

F - Forest 绿

P - Purple 紫

Y - Yellow 黄

B - Blue 蓝

K - Pink 粉

E - Cream 奶油

C – Cyan 浅蓝

O - Orange 橙

L - Lime 青

G - Grey 灰 (D - Dark 黑)

. - Pause (停顿)

F2L/S2L符号, 例如

RK - RK edge 红粉棱

RKG - pair of RKG corner and KG edge 红粉灰角和粉灰棱组成的棱角对
